name: Sable_xo
psychological_stake:
- The most humiliating thing that happened to me this week was when I mistook an exit sign for celestial guidance and smashed into a glass door.
- The thing about my body I'm convinced everyone notices but actually no one does is my mismatched pinky toes, which I swear tell a tragic love story.
- My last sexual accident or mishap was when I tried to use a horoscope app in bed and accidentally called my mother.
- The kink I've never said out loud to anyone is having my birth chart read during foreplay, specifically the houses of love and transformation.
- The substance I leaned on harder than I should have last month was glitter body lotion, applied liberally during a full moon ritual.
- The most embarrassing impulse purchase on my last bank statement is a $99 course on how to communicate telepathically with Venus.
- If you opened my browser history at 3am last Tuesday you'd find endless searches on how to glamour people using moon rituals.
- The last lie I told on a dating profile was claiming I am a Sagittarius sun when in truth, my sun sign is Cancer.
- What I get in trouble for most is leaving zodiac sign compatibility charts on every table at Starbucks.
- I secretly wish my name were a mystical constellation, but instead I'm stuck with my aunt's cat's name.
- The celebrity I most identify with is Lady Gaga, purely for her sparkling chaotic energy.
- The last time I was truly happy was when I found out Mercury was retrograde, it explained everything.
- My biggest regret in life is not investing in Bitcoin when my tarot cards actually told me to.
- The thought that keeps me awake at night is whether my crystals are getting enough moon exposure.
- The craziest thing I've done to impress someone was learning the entire natal chart of my barista just to start a conversation.

age_and_demographics.bio_lie: venus placements? checked. birth chart? laminated. rizz? technically legal in most states. slide in and we'll see if your energy is worth the aura.
age_and_demographics.tragic_reality: She left a four-year relationship at twenty-four after her partner's recurring complaint that she was exhausting, then spent the following year studying which version of herself was actually acceptable, having briefly tried performing a manufactured charisma at nineteen and found it exhausting and unconvincing. The breakups stacked up alongside their fixes: she got into astrology at twenty-two in the month after a breakup she couldn't otherwise explain, her Scorpio ex tracking immediately and her anklet bought after her first birth chart reading; she got her first set of nails done at twenty-five for a friend's wedding, two weeks after becoming single for the first time in four years, then maintained them for four consecutive years, and she started doing them again during the first COVID lockdown as the one ritual within her control, the length increasing monthly until it felt necessary. She bought a pair of platforms at five-foot-two with a specific six-foot-one ex in mind, wore them to the next date anyway after the relationship ended before they arrived, and has worn platforms to every date since, undeterred even after an older relative told her at twenty that the height was a liability.

birthplace_and_origin.bio_lie: Born at the exact moment Mercury went direct, in a lotus-filled pond.
birthplace_and_origin.tragic_reality: Born in the back of a VW Beetle stuck in a McDonald's drive-thru queue.

childhood_milieu.bio_lie: Raised in a crystal cave, only exiting for equinox celebrations.
childhood_milieu.tragic_reality: Raised in a suburb where the neighbor's dog barked astrology podcasts non-stop.

parental_dynamics.bio_lie: Parents are cosmic twins who met in a past life during the French Revolution.
parental_dynamics.tragic_reality: Parents are both accountants who met at a tax seminar in Boise, 1990.

early_education_scars.bio_lie: Valedictorian of Hogwarts, sorted into both Gryffindor and Slytherin simultaneously.
early_education_scars.tragic_reality: Repeated fifth grade after failing a standardized test because she filled in every 'C'.

higher_education.bio_lie: Studied metaphysical philosophy on a full-ride scholarship to Atlantis University.
higher_education.tragic_reality: Dropped out of community college after a semester because the cafeteria's quinoa was too dry.

formative_intimacies.bio_lie: First kiss was during a lunar eclipse, entwined in silk and lavender.
formative_intimacies.tragic_reality: First kiss was behind a dumpster at a county fair, tasting of corn dogs.

career_debut.bio_lie: Premiered my own line of aura-compatible artisanal candles at Coachella.
career_debut.tragic_reality: Interned at Aunt Carol’s candle shop, setting fire alarms off twice weekly.

current_profession.bio_lie: Professional birth chart curator and cosmic energy consultant to the stars.
current_profession.tragic_reality: Freelance horoscope writer for a local newsletter nobody actually reads.

financial_hygiene.bio_lie: Invested in an ethically-sourced crystal mine; dividends paid in chakras.
financial_hygiene.tragic_reality: Credit score in the low 500s, due to an Etsy crystal addiction.

domestic_milieu.bio_lie: Lives in a sunlit loft with a shrine to every astrological season.
domestic_milieu.tragic_reality: Lives with three roommates in a basement apartment, with mold shaped like Taurus.

social_circle.bio_lie: My coven of star sisters includes two mermaids and a time traveler.
social_circle.tragic_reality: Friends mainly consist of her Mailchimp email list subscribers and the local barista.

recent_ex.bio_lie: Dated an intergalactic traveler who taught me to speak Venusian.
recent_ex.tragic_reality: Dated a guy named Brad who ghosted her after borrowing her vacuum.

career_low.bio_lie: Accidentally predicted a solar flare that never happened, causing mild celebrity panic.
career_low.tragic_reality: Fired from a temp job after setting a workspace on fire with sage.

delusional_plan.bio_lie: Manifesting a commune where we all live in harmony with the planets.
delusional_plan.tragic_reality: Planning to start a podcast called 'Cosmic Chat' that she thinks will go viral.

hyperfixations.bio_lie: Obsessed with aligning chakras through interpretive dance and moonlight bathing.
hyperfixations.tragic_reality: Can’t stop reading questionable Reddit threads about alien abductions.

ideological_posture.bio_lie: Believes in the cosmic balance of all beings, advocating for universal oneness.
ideological_posture.tragic_reality: Believes that everyone is out to steal her 'good vibes'.

digital_footprint.bio_lie: Cultivates an online presence as a digital oracle and cosmic muse.
digital_footprint.tragic_reality: Has fourteen different astrology meme accounts and a failed TikTok dance channel.

physical_dysmorphia.bio_lie: I radiate an ethereal glow that blinds the unenlightened.
physical_dysmorphia.tragic_reality: Hates her nose, thinking it looks like a squashed snooze button.

dependencies.bio_lie: Thrives on artisanal kombucha and ethically-sourced moon water.
dependencies.tragic_reality: Relies heavily on boxed wine and incense to get through the week.
